retrieved_result: How Much do Carpenters Make? How Much do Carpenters Make? According to the BLS, carpenters earned a median salary of $43,600 in 2016, or $20.96 per hour. The highest-paid carpenters earned about $79,480, while the lowest-paid earned $27,070. The natural gas distribution industry pays the highest for carpentry work. Salary Outlo
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses carpenter salaries, which is unrelated to database query optimization.
